title: How Early Are You at the Airport | #shorts
full_text: Hey, hey, hey, very good. I'm leaving, I'm leaving for the airport. 3 hours before the flight you are It is supposed TO BE BE THERE 3 HOURS BEFORE. I DON'T KNOW WHAT SO WHAT IT IS NOT ALREADY CHECKED IN. I'M NOT GOING WITH YOU. Always stressed out and then in the traffic. Oh my god. OH MY GOD. I'M GOING. BUT WE END up paying for two Ubers. I don't want to pay for two Ubers. So you take the train then. Bye.
